allow: PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force } catch {} } }; "ok")

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force } catch {} } }; "stopped")

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force; "killed PID $_" } catch {} } } else { "no listener on 4000" })

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const x=JSON.parse\(d\).data;console.log\(' items:',x.items.length,'| total:',x.total,'| page:',x.page,'| pageSize:',x.pageSize,'| totalPages:',x.totalPages\)}\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:4000/api/public/quotes -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name":"Emily Carter","company":"Process Engineering Ltd","email":"emily@example.com","mobile":"9876543210","country":"India","city":"Pune","message":"Need delivery by Q3.","productName":"Air Receiver","quoteType":"standard","configuration":[{"label":"Volume","value":"2 m³"},{"label":"Working Pressure","value":"12 Bar"},{"label":"Material of Construction","value":"MS \(Mild Steel\)"},{"label":"Support Type","value":"Leg Support"},{"label":"Quantity","value":"1"}],"source":"Air Receiver configurator"}' -w '\\nHTTP %{http_code}\\n')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:4000/api/public/quotes -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name":"Rajeev Deshmukh","company":"Chemtech EPC","email":"rajeev@chemtech.co","mobile":"8123456789","country":"India","city":"Nashik","message":"Need SS316, radiography 100%.","productName":"Air Receiver","quoteType":"custom","configuration":[{"label":"Volume","value":"7.5 m³"},{"label":"Pressure","value":"14 Bar"},{"label":"Diameter","value":"1500 mm"},{"label":"Height","value":"4200 mm"},{"label":"Material","value":"SS316"},{"label":"Quantity","value":"2"}],"source":"Air Receiver custom builder"}' -w '\\nHTTP %{http_code}\\n')

Bash(node -e 'const{PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);p.$queryRawUnsafe\('\\''SHOW COLUMNS FROM leads LIKE "feedback"'\\''\).then\(r=>{console.log\(r.map\(c=>c.Field+'\\'' '\\''+c.Type+'\\'' NULL='\\''+c.Null\)\);return p.$disconnect\(\)}\);')

Bash(node -e 'const{PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);p.lead.findFirst\({where:{email:'\\''flowtest@example.com'\\''}}\).then\(r=>{console.log\('\\''DB row -> status:'\\'',r.leadStatus,'\\''| feedback:'\\'',JSON.stringify\(r.feedback\)\);return p.lead.delete\({where:{id:r.id}}\);}\).then\(\(\)=>{console.log\('\\''\(cleaned up test lead\)'\\''\);return p.$disconnect\(\);}\);')

Bash(node -e 'const{PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);p.caseStudy.updateMany\({where:{slug:'\\''48mt-distillation-column'\\''},data:{title:'\\''48.5 MT distillation column delivered three weeks early'\\''}}\).then\(\(\)=>p.caseStudy.findMany\({select:{title:true,slug:true}}\)\).then\(r=>{r.forEach\(c=>console.log\('\\''restored:'\\'',c.title,'\\''\('\\''+c.title.length+'\\'' chars\)'\\''\)\);return p.$disconnect\(\);}\);')

Bash(node -e 'const{PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);p.passwordReset.findFirst\({orderBy:{id:'\\''desc'\\''}}\).then\(r=>{if\(!r\){console.log\('\\''none'\\''\);return p.$disconnect\(\);}const mins=Math.round\(\(new Date\(r.expiresAt\)-new Date\(r.createdAt\)\)/60000\);console.log\('\\''created:'\\'',r.createdAt.toISOString\(\),'\\''| expires in ~'\\''+mins+'\\'' min | used:'\\'',r.usedAt\);return p.$disconnect\(\);}\);')
